ideation: This sequence aims to mimic the gentle, swaying motion of a sheep.  The arms will move in a soft, rocking pattern, suggesting a peaceful and calm demeanor.  Each arm will move independently, creating a natural, asymmetrical movement. I'll use slight variations in joint angles and wrist rotations to avoid a rigid, repetitive motion.  The overall effect should evoke a sense of tranquility and the gentle nature of sheep.

frames.beat: arms sway gently, like a calm sheep
a soft rocking motion, shifting weight slightly
the gentle sway returns to a resting state
